
EN25QH128A QSPI1 FLASH test
QSPI1_MEM_BASE=0x90000000
TEST_ADDR=0x00FF0000 (erase/write)
AHB=288000000Hz APB1=144000000Hz APB2=144000000Hz
CRM_AHBEN3=0x00004003 (xmcen=1 qspi1en=1)
QSPI1_CLKDIV=12 QSPI1_SCK~24000000Hz
GPIOF cfgr=0x002AA000 pull=0x00000000 muxl=0x99000000 muxh=0x000009AA idt=0x0000FBFF odt=0x00000000
GPIOG cfgr=0x00022000 pull=0x00000000 muxl=0x0A000000 muxh=0x00000005 idt=0x0000FFFF odt=0x00000000
BB_RDID: 1C 70 18
QSPI2 probe ctrl2=0x00000002 fsize=0x00ABCDEF cmd_w1=0x55000001
WAIT_FAIL stage=cmdsts(no_data) flag=0x00000001 exp=1 act=0
QSPI2 ctrl=0x00000087 ctrl2=0x00000000 fifosts=0x00000001 cmdsts=0x00000000 rsts=0x00000000
QSPI2 cmd_w0=0x00000000 cmd_w1=0x01000000 cmd_w2=0x00000000 cmd_w3=0x66000000
QSPI2 xip_w0=0x00003000 xip_w1=0x00002000 xip_w2=0x0F010F01 xip_w3=0x00000001
QSPI2 cmdsts(no_data): FAIL stage=cmdsts(no_data)
QSPI_RDID variant=0
GPIOF cfgr=0x002AA000 pull=0x00000000 muxl=0x99000000 muxh=0x000009AA idt=0x0000FBFF odt=0x000001C0
GPIOG cfgr=0x00022000 pull=0x00000000 muxl=0x0A000000 muxh=0x00000005 idt=0x0000FEFF odt=0x00000040
